/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/custom_interfaces/msg/message__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/custom_interfaces/srv/get_nav__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/custom_interfaces/srv/set_nav__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/isaac/Documents/D.A.V.E./ros2_ws/build/custom_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
